label: Structured-decoding runtimes

node.label: Structured-decoding runtimes
node.definition: Structured-decoding runtimes compile grammars or schemas into efficient token filters integrated with a model server’s decoding loop.
node.why_it_matters: They make reliable structured generation practical at serving scale instead of relying only on slow application-side retries.
limitations: Grammar compilation, tokenizer interaction, and per-request constraints can reduce throughput or complicate batching.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Structured-decoding runtimes has an `operationalizes` dependency on Grammar- and schema-constrained decoding because Grammar- and schema-constrained decoding is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.

In this atlas graph, Structured-decoding runtimes has an `operationalizes` dependency on Model servers & inference runtimes because Model servers & inference runtimes is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.

In this atlas graph, Structured-decoding runtimes has an `operationalizes` dependency on Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion because Graph compilers, runtimes & operator fusion is modeled as infrastructure needed to operationalize the node.
